First, we need to subtract 12 days from June 12th. This brings us to June 0th, which is the same as May 31st. We've subtracted 12 days.

We still need to subtract 14 - 12 = 2 more days.
Subtracting 2 days from May 31st gives us May 29th.

So, 14 days ago from June 12, 1975, was May 29, 1975.

The answer is 05/29/1975.
